zh.lifeSummary: 當Eleanor Clarke於1469年出生在英國瓦維其可爾史達科特 奧 阿沃時，她的父親Robert Clarke20歲，母親Mercy Youlden20歲。她於1486年與William Wakeman在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾德雷頓結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1515年在她的家鄉享年46歲。

nameMeanings.name: Clarke
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish: variant of   Clark  .

History: This name was brought independently to New England by many bearers from the 17th century onward. Nicholas Clarke was one of the founders of Hartford, CT (coming from Cambridge, MA with Thomas Hooker) in 1635.

variants.name: Clark
meanings: English: from Middle English clerk, clark ‘clerk, cleric, writer’ (Old French clerc; see Clerc ). The original sense was ‘man in a religious order, cleric, clergyman’. As all writing and secretarial work in medieval Christian Europe was normally done by members of the clergy, the term clerk came to mean ‘scholar, secretary, recorder, or penman’ as well as ‘cleric’. As a surname, it was particularly common for one who had taken only minor holy orders. In medieval Christian Europe, clergy in minor orders were permitted to marry and so found families; thus the surname could become established.
Irish (Westmeath, Mayo): in Ireland the English surname was frequently adopted, partly by translation for Ó Cléirigh; see Cleary .
Americanized form of Dutch   De Klerk   or Flemish   De Clerck   or of variants of these names, and possibly also of French   Clerc  . Compare   Clerk   2 and   De Clark  .

nameMeanings.name: Eleanor
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

variants.name: Ellenor
meanings: Variant spelling of   Eleanor  , the result of blending with   Ellen .

variants.name: Elenor
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

en.lifeSummary: When Eleanor Clarke was born in 1469, in Stratford on Avon, Warwickshire, England, her father, Robert Clarke, was 20 and her mother, Mercy Youlden, was 20. She married William Wakeman in 1486, in Drayton, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1515, in her hometown, at the age of 46.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Eleanor Clarke est née en 1469, à Stratford on Avon, Warwickshire, Angleterre, son père, Robert Clarke, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Mercy Youlden, avait 20 ans. Elle a épousé William Wakeman en 1486, à Drayton, Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1515, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 46 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Eleanor Clarke 1469 in Stratford on Avon, Warwickshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert Clarke 20 und ihre Mutter Mercy Youlden 20. Sie hat 1486 in Drayton, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom William Wakeman geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1515 im Alter von 46 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Eleanor Clarke è nata il nel 1469 nel Stratford on Avon, Warwickshire, England, sua padre, Robert Clarke, aveva 20 anni e sua madre, Mercy Youlden, aveva 20 anni. Lei sposato William Wakeman nel 1486, nel Drayton, Warwickshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1515, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 46 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Eleanor Clarke(이)가 1469년 영국 워윅실르 스트라트퍼드  아폰에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert Clarke(은)는 20세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mercy Youlden(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 1486년 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르 드라이턴에서 William Wakeman(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1515년 그녀의 고향에서 46세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Eleanor Clarke родилась в 1469 г. в местности стратфорд он авон, варвиккшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Robert Clarke было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Mercy Youlden, 20. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Wakeman в 1486 г. в местности дреитон, варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1515 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 46 лет.
